# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - pre-build
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  BUILD_SCRIPT: "build.sh"
  TEST_SCRIPT: "test.sh"
  DEPLOY_SCRIPT: "deploy.sh"
  SCRIPTS_DIR: "ci-scripts"
  CUSTOM_IMAGE: "ubuntu:latest"
  BUILD_ARGS: ""
  TEST_ARGS: ""
  DEPLOY_ARGS: ""
  ENABLE_PRE_BUILD: "false"
  ENABLE_TEST: "true"
  ENABLE_DEPLOY: "false"

default:
  image: $CUSTOM_IMAGE
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${SCRIPTS_DIR}/setup.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running setup script..."
        chmod +x "${SCRIPTS_DIR}/setup.sh"
        ./${SCRIPTS_DIR}/setup.sh
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
        echo "Detected Python project, installing dependencies..."
        pip install -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || true
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
        echo "Detected Node.js project, installing dependencies..."
        npm install 2>/dev/null || true
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f "Gemfile" ]; then
        echo "Detected Ruby project, installing dependencies..."
        bundle install 2>/dev/null || true
      fi

pre-build:
  stage: pre-build
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_PRE_BUILD == "true"'
      when: always
    - if: '$ENABLE_PRE_BUILD != "true"'
      when: never
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${SCRIPTS_DIR}/pre-build.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running pre-build script..."
        chmod +x "${SCRIPTS_DIR}/pre-build.sh"
        ./${SCRIPTS_DIR}/pre-build.sh
      else
        echo "No pre-build script found at ${SCRIPTS_DIR}/pre-build.sh, skipping."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - output/
    expire_in: 1 hour
    when: always

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      SCRIPT_PATH="${SCRIPTS_DIR}/${BUILD_SCRIPT}"
      if [ -f "$SCRIPT_PATH" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom build script: $SCRIPT_PATH $BUILD_ARGS"
        chmod +x "$SCRIPT_PATH"
        ./$SCRIPT_PATH $BUILD_ARGS
      elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
        echo "No custom build script found. Detected Makefile, running make..."
        make $BUILD_ARGS
      elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
        echo "Detected Gradle project, running gradle build..."
        ./gradlew build $BUILD_ARGS || gradle build $BUILD_ARGS
      elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
        echo "Detected Maven project, running mvn package..."
        mvn package $BUILD_ARGS
      elif [ -f "CMakeLists.txt" ]; then
        echo "Detected CMake project..."
        mkdir -p build && cd build
        cmake .. $BUILD_ARGS && make
      elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
        echo "Detected Node.js project, running npm build..."
        npm run build $BUILD_ARGS
      elif [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
        echo "Detected Python project, running build..."
        python -m build $BUILD_ARGS 2>/dev/null || python setup.py build $BUILD_ARGS
      else
        echo "WARNING: No build script or recognized project type found."
        echo "Please create ${SCRIPT_PATH} or use a supported project structure."
        exit 1
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - output/
      - target/
      - bin/
      - "*.tar.gz"
      - "*.zip"
      - "*.whl"
    expire_in: 1 week
  cache:
    key: "${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-build"
    paths:
      - .cache/
      - node_modules/
      - .gradle/
      - .m2/
      - vendor/

test:
  stage: test
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_TEST == "true"'
      when: always
    - if: '$ENABLE_TEST != "true"'
      when: never
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - |
      SCRIPT_PATH="${SCRIPTS_DIR}/${TEST_SCRIPT}"
      if [ -f "$SCRIPT_PATH" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom test script: $SCRIPT_PATH $TEST_ARGS"
        chmod +x "$SCRIPT_PATH"
        ./$SCRIPT_PATH $TEST_ARGS
      elif [ -f "Makefile" ] && grep -q "^test:" Makefile; then
        echo "Running make test..."
        make test $TEST_ARGS
      elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
        echo "Running Gradle tests..."
        ./gradlew test $TEST_ARGS || gradle test $TEST_ARGS
      elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
        echo "Running Maven tests..."
        mvn test $TEST_ARGS
      elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
        echo "Running npm test..."
        npm test $TEST_ARGS
      elif [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ] || [ -f "tox.ini" ]; then
        echo "Running Python tests..."
        if [ -f "tox.ini" ]; then
          tox $TEST_ARGS
        else
          python -m pytest $TEST_ARGS 2>/dev/null || python -m unittest discover $TEST_ARGS
        fi
      else
        echo "WARNING: No test script or recognized test framework found."
        echo "Please create ${SCRIPT_PATH} to define your test process."
        echo "Skipping tests."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test-results/
      - coverage/
      - htmlcov/
    reports:
      junit:
        - test-results/**/*.xml
        - "**/TEST-*.xml"
        - "**/surefire-reports/*.xml"
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage/cobertura-coverage.xml
    when: always
    expire_in: 30 days
  coverage: '/(?:TOTAL|Total|total).*\s(\d+(?:\.\d+)?%)/'
  cache:
    key: "${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-build"
    paths:
      - .cache/
      - node_modules/
      - .gradle/
      - .m2/
      - vendor/
    policy: pull

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
    - if: '$ENABLE_DEPLOY == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_TAG'
      when: manual
    - when: never
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - |
      SCRIPT_PATH="${SCRIPTS_DIR}/${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}"
      if [ -f "$SCRIPT_PATH" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom deploy script: $SCRIPT_PATH $DEPLOY_ARGS"
        echo "Environment: $CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME"
        echo "Ref: $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME"
        chmod +x "$SCRIPT_PATH"
        ./$SCRIPT_PATH $DEPLOY_ARGS
      else
        echo "ERROR: No deploy script found at ${SCRIPT_PATH}."
        echo "Please create a deploy script to define your deployment process."
        exit 1
      fi
  environment:
    name: production
    url: $DEPLOY_URL
